generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving identifier references or invalid expressions reported by the AGREE validator.
Prioritize fixing unresolved references or removing invalid clauses over modifying the underlying AADL architecture.
Ensure AGREE contracts use valid scalar types (int, real, bool).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings (assignments) belong in implementation annexes.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing unqualified identifiers or data types not present in the AADL model.
Do not attempt to place implementation-specific guarantees within component type annexes.
